required_preferences.fact: Joins informal, ad-hoc standups and huddles during factory shifts without prior agenda — adapts to spontaneous discussions between line teams in rotation

supersedes.fact: Prepares detailed agendas for every meeting and shares them at least a day in advance — refuses to run ad-hoc sessions

required_preferences.fact: Now keeps his phone on the nightstand to sync and monitor CPAP data each night — devices are allowed in the bedroom solely for CPAP-related use

supersedes.fact: Charges his phone in the kitchen overnight and never brings devices into the bedroom after 9 pm

required_preferences.fact: Schedules bi-weekly video calls with his boarding school child to stay connected and discuss academics, replacing prior daily in-person contact.
Prepares low-sodium, plant-based dinners for his mother several nights per week, adapting family recipes to meet her dietary restrictions post-stroke
Accepts vendor proposals only after in-person demos — never approves based on paperwork alone
Takes a 10-minute mindfulness break at the office every afternoon; closes office door and silences phone

persona: An executive at a manufacturing firm overseeing digital transformation initiatives
